primary_claim: Under defined degraded-connectivity conditions, twin-informed service-aware orchestration reduces service outage or recovery time relative to static, network-only, and service-priority policies while respecting energy, fairness, privacy, and reliability constraints.
rationale: recovery_time_s is already produced by the NTN resilience decision path and Gate 4 infrastructure; it is directly interpretable and available in frozen telemetry/schemas without inventing a new composite before pilot collection.
amendment_policy: Preserve original lock file; record amendments with reason and hash chain.
